basic_details.job_title: Rajendra University Balangir Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Faculty Members for Teacher Education Programmes
basic_details.short_information: Rajendra University Balangir Faculty Members for Teacher Education Programmes Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website of Rajendra University Balangir. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the Rajendra University Balangir Faculty Members for Teacher Education Programmes Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Degree, M.Ed., M.A. Education, Ph.D. in Education, NET/SLET/SET, M.P.Ed, MFA, Post Graduate degree in Music/Dance/Theatre Arts
qualification.details: Professor of Education: Postgraduate Degree with minimum 55% marks in the relevant discipline, Post Graduate degree in Education (M.Ed. or M.A. Education) with minimum 55% marks, Ph.D. degree in Education or relevant discipline, and other qualifications/experience as per UGC or State Government norms. Associate Professor of Education: Postgraduate Degree with minimum 55% marks in the relevant discipline, Post Graduation degree in Education (M.Ed. or M.A. Education) with minimum 55% marks, Ph.D. degree in Education or relevant discipline, and other qualifications/experience as per UGC or State Government norms. Assistant Professor of Education (Perspectives in Education or Foundation Courses): Postgraduate degree in Social Sciences with minimum 55% marks and M.Ed. degree with minimum 55% marks, OR Postgraduate (M.A) degree in Education with minimum 55% marks and B.Ed./B.El.Ed degree with minimum 55% marks. National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or similar test (SLET/SET) is required, unless possessing a Ph.D. degree in Education as per UGC regulations. Assistant Professor of Education (Curriculum and Pedagogic Courses): Postgraduate degree in Sciences/Mathematics/Social Science/Languages with minimum 55% marks and M.Ed. degree with minimum 55% marks. National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or similar test (SLET/SET) is required, unless possessing a Ph.D. degree in Education as per UGC regulations. Assistant Professor Specialized Courses: Physical Education: Master of Physical Education (M.P.Ed) with minimum 55% marks. Desirable: Ph.D. or UGC-NET and Training/Qualification in Yoga Education. Assistant Professor Specialized Courses: Visual Arts: Post Graduate degree in Fine Arts (MFA) with minimum 55% marks. Desirable: Ph.D. or UGC-NET. Assistant Professor Specialized Courses: Performing Arts: Post Graduate degree in Music/Dance/Theatre Arts with minimum 55% marks. Desirable: Ph.D. or UGC-NET.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor of Education (Perspectives in Education or Foundation Courses)
Assistant Professor of Education (Curriculum and Pedagogic Courses)
Assistant Professor Specialized Courses: Physical Education
Assistant Professor Specialized Courses: Visual Arts
Assistant Professor Specialized Courses: Performing Arts

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Rajendra University Balangir Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rajendrauniversity.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Rajendra University Balangir Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Rajendra University Balangir Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Faculty Members for Teacher Education Programmes posts is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty Members at Rajendra University Balangir?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies for Faculty Members for Teacher Education Programmes posts at Rajendra University Balangir.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Faculty Members posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Faculty Members posts ranges from Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications include a Postgraduate Degree with at least 55% marks, M.Ed. or M.A. Education with 55% marks, and in some cases, a Ph.D. degree in Education or relevant NET/SLET/SET qualification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1000/-, SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these faculty positions will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Rajendra University Balangir, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these faculty positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these faculty positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Which city and state is Rajendra University Balangir located in?
faq.answer: Rajendra University Balangir is located in Balangir city, Odisha state, with a pincode of 767002.
